symbols: arches opening to sky — the boundary between enclosed and infinite space
description: A large-scale illusionistic wall painting (quadratura) depicting a simulated loggia or open gallery with elaborate Baroque architecture. The painting creates the illusion of an open multi-arched arcade with columns, pilasters, and decorative sculptures. Through the arches, landscape views and sky are visible. The checkered marble floor enhances the perspective illusion. A framed landscape painting appears at the center. The work demonstrates the Baroque mastery of architectural trompe-l'oeil, designed to visually expand an interior space.
